summary: Iteration 2 — Theme 3 Bold & Bright + native reviews + Judge.me import. All 24 backend tests pass (13 existing + 11 new for reviews/import). Frontend e2e flow exercised: Home (Bold), Workwear, Teams & Schools, Product detail with leave-a-review + form submit (verified review appears in list), /reviews, /admin/import-reviews (imported=1 confirmed), /design (all designer-* testids), /contact, /checkout/success, /themes (4 selectable themes). BoldNavbar has all expected data-testids.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~515 lines — still single-file. Acceptable for now but at next feature add consider splitting routes (reviews, checkout) into modules.

Class-scoped pytest fixture as instance method emits deprecation warning (PytestRemovedIn10Warning) in test_reviews.py::TestProductReviewsAggregate.seed — works but consider @classmethod for forward-compat.
Reviews don't currently expose pagination beyond a `limit` query param on /api/reviews/product/{id} (default 50). Fine for MVP; add offset/skip if review volume grows.
create_review and import-judgeme have no auth/rate-limit. Acceptable for MVP but flag for production.

Console hydration warnings observed on /design and /admin/import-reviews about <span> inside <option> — these come from the Emergent editor's source-instrumentation injection on dynamic <option> children, NOT a real app bug. Functionality works. No action needed.
seed_data_creation: Tests seed reviews with TEST_ prefix on kids-tee + personalised-tee and a couple judgeme-source reviews on personalised-hoodie / polo-shirt / personalised-tee. Playwright run also created 1 native review on personalised-tee (PW Test Title) and 1 judgeme-imported on personalised-hoodie (E2E Imported). All harmless test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test files live in /app/backend/tests/ — backend_test.py (catalog/contact/theme/checkout) + test_reviews.py (reviews + judgeme import). Run together: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is read from env (with a hardcoded preview fallback) — both files use the same pattern. Reviews collection accumulates test data with 'TEST_' / 'PW Test' / 'E2E' prefixes; safe to leave or purge.
